result.reason: The 'port scan' feature can be considered a brute force attack and poses a security risk, therefore it should be disabled.
result.approach: Remove all UI entry points for the port scan feature, delete the PortScanWindow and its associated designer file, remove the core PortScanner and ScanHost logic, update WindowType and AppWindows to remove references, delete the PortScanDeserializer, and remove all related language resources and test files. Remaining usages of PortScanner.IsPortOpen will be addressed if they cause build failures, potentially by replacing with a simpler port check or removing them entirely.
